case_title: LYNCH, ZUBEDAH VS SMITH, DALE RAY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $225.00 FILED BY LYNCH, ZUBEDAH AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, DALE RAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DALE RAY SMITH RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
